top_signals.title: Japan's 'invest locally' plan likely to spur demand for assets like bitcoin, gold
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Mogotes says drilling expands Andes copper-gold target
top_signals.summary: Mogotes Metals expands its Albor copper-gold discovery at Filo Sur with near-surface drill results in the prolific Vicuña district.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Ex-US Navy commander quits NovaRed copper firm over Noem hire
top_signals.summary: Phil Ehr resigns from NovaRed Mining's advisory board after hiring ex-DHS chief Kristi Noem, drawing scrutiny.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Ryuk ransomware member pleads guilty in the US, faces 15 years in prison
top_signals.summary: A 34-year-old Armenian man has pleaded guilty to hacking U.S. companies and deploying the infamous Ryuk ransomware to encrypt their systems. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Traders fall back in love with Meta. Here's where bulls see it going
top_signals.summary: Meta Platform's AI efforts are looking like the recipe for a comeback after an almost year-long drought in shares of the $1.7 trillion market-cap company.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: IDEX finds tungsten in Idaho copper drilling
top_signals.summary: IDEX Metals has added a critical-metals angle to the Kismet target at its Freeze copper project in Idaho.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Apple sues OpenAI for trade secret theft in pivotal case
top_signals.summary: The iPhone maker said in a suit Friday that OpenAI encouraged Apple employees to share information, components, drawings and other materials related to upcoming products.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
